E243 - The Top Ten Alien Disasters
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten most devastating disasters ever documented that might have an otherworldly connection, including a flying monster at a nuclear incident.

programme.title: E232 - The Top Ten Pyramid Sites
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with 4800-year-old ruins to Egypt's famous Giza Plateau.

programme.title: E16 - Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: E322 - Big Tex
programme.desc: Cruising through the Lone Star State, the Wolfe brothers visit a one-of-a-kind home that was custom-built around a staggering Texas-size collection of pieces.

programme.desc: When a customer walks into the shop with a signature worthy of presidential praise, can Corey make a new deal? Meanwhile, Chum heads to a prop house in L.A. to reflect on some historic Hollywood items.

programme.title: Urban Foraging - Fresh, Tasty And Free
programme.desc: More and more city dwellers are collecting food in the asphalt jungle. They harvest herbs by the roadside and grow wild vegetables in cracks in the concrete. For these modern foragers and hunters, the food is free, tasty and more varied than in the supermarket.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: Street Debate: What Is Driving Young Nigerian Professionals To 'Japa'?
programme.desc: Nigeria is losing a significant number of its most talented professionals, who are leaving the country in search of better opportunities abroad. This mass migration of Nigerians is commonly referred to as 'japa.' In this week's show, Edith Kimani asks young Nigerians what is driving them to leave the country.

programme.title: Delhi's Black Kites: How Raptors Keep A Megacity Running
programme.desc: Scientists reveal how Delhi's black kites feed on waste and interact with people. Plus: How a 600-year-old network is easing Bidar's water problems.

programme.title: How Africa Is Building Forward
programme.desc: Today, host Maty Sy welcomes you from the new Goethe-Institut in Dakar, designed by Pritzker Prize laureate Francis Kere. Senegalese architect Nzinga Mboup, who oversaw the project, tours you around.

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E98 - Up High
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bounce on The Tubby Bouncy. Po bounces as high as a cloud, then Laa-Laa bounces higher, Dipsy bounces even higher and Tinky Winky bounces highest of all.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E4 - Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: E5 - Ufo
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: E25 - Messy Gets Clean
programme.desc: Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap is too much.

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E37 - Mars Mission, Chile
programme.desc: Xuli and Foz help NASA after a close encounter with a UFO makes them lose the Mars Rover.

programme.title: E11 - Cats
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E42 - Go Jet Academy: Irrigation
programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E45 - Seaside
programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: E44 - Flower
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help her find a new place for her friend Isabelle the Sun-bell Daisy. This proves trickier than initially planned as Isabelle has some specific needs.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E9 - Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E22 - Tomatina Festival, Bunol, Spain
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: TV Patrol Linggo Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Everybody Sing
programme.desc: Everybody, Sing! is the first and original community singing game show where 100 contestants play together in a series of guess-the-lyrics karaoke challenges to win more than 2,000,000 pesos to be shared by everybody.

programme.title: Juan Conversations With Rose Eclarinal S3
programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

The DVD
programme.desc: Tom Thomas has to return a DVD he borrowed from his friend, but discovers his player can't read the disk anymore. Simka and Nolik help Tom Thomas clean it so it works again.

programme.title: It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: Code Yellow
programme.desc: Things at the garage heat up when the spirit of friendly competition takes over as Jesse calls on a baseball star for a few tips.

programme.title: Computer Memory
programme.desc: Find out about the two types of memory used by computers to function - the short term memory for immediate use and the long term memory to store information.

programme.title: Body Swap
programme.desc: Cleopatra makes a cunning plan. She builds a body swap machine that overtakes Sprinter's body without anybody noticing. She fails to see that when she gets Sprinter's body, he gets hers.

programme.title: Teamwork Makes The Dream Work
programme.desc: In Birmingham, four young gymnasts are taking the world of male artistic gymnastics by storm. The boys are trained by coach Luke, who is himself a former Olympian, and they are setting themselves big targets for the National Championships.

programme.title: Fat
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors look at body fat and show how it can keep you warm!

programme.title: What Makes Fireworks Bang?
programme.desc: Fireworks were invented in China and were originally thought to be able to get rid of evil spirits and bring good luck. One of the most important components in fireworks is gunpowder. The different metal salts produce the colours.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Wisdom Tooth
programme.desc: The villain DiktaThor learns what a wisdom tooth is and plans to collect all the wisdom teeth in Hilltown, to become the wisest and take over the city. Can Sprinter stop him?

programme.title: Elephant - Crush
programme.desc: The elephant accidentally stands on a flower and is upset that he has crushed the innocent thing. He does everything he can to revive the flower, but things get worse before they get better. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Media superstar 'Devil Daniels - Monster Hunter' is hunting a sea-creature he believes is a menace, but the Nektons want to protect.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.....a Pan
programme.desc: Henry meets a gold panning pan next to a creek. Pan would love to find gold but lately all he has found is sand.

programme.title: Cool Baking Technology
programme.desc: A German baker has found a new, money-saving way to bake bread. Small droplets that are created via ultrasound change the way dough is proved and, as a result, help to cut energy costs.

programme.title: Stepping up
programme.desc: The newly formed ice dancing duo Josh and Lucy just can't seem to find the chemistry they need to make it as a winning formula. Ice hockey wannabe Destiny has set her sights on becoming a net-minder, but the reality isn't quite what she expected.

programme.title: The Self-healing Body
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand demonstrate a great body trick you can do at home. They look at how amazing the body is at healing itself. Then they look at the best bits of Operation Ouch so far.

programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Stepping up
programme.desc: The newly formed ice dancing duo Josh and Lucy just can't seem to find the chemistry they need to make it as a winning formula. Ice hockey wannabe Destiny has set her sights on becoming a net-minder, but the reality isn't quite what she expected.

programme.title: E23 - Vietnam, The Journey Of A Lifetime
programme.desc: Bordered by the East Sea and neighboring China, Laos and Cambodia, Vietnam is a fascinating country where tradition and modernity blend harmoniously. Despite its colonial past and conflicts, it has risen to become one of Asia's most dynamic economies while preserving a strong cultural identity.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion:2025-2026

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: Geopolitis:2025-2026
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: Young artistes, each from a universe that's as rich as it is diverse, talk about themselves, their careers, their music, their influences...

programme.title: E22 - Taming Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: crumbled bacon and lentils, lemony lentil soup, fresh pasta with Italian sausages and haricot beans, homemade falafels, chickpea and chocolate biscuits.

programme.title: E13 - Here's A Brown Bear
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: E923 - Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends / Pups Save A Puffy Mayor
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble. // During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after a puffy shirt floats away with them.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E104 - Big Red Chicken Wake Up! / The Mystery Gift
programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.title: E248 - Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: E105 - The Orange Empire
programme.desc: The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E248 - Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E103 - Pups And The Kitty-Tastrophe / Pups Save A Train
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes? // Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: E502 - Pups Save Big Paw
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: E302 - Pups Save A Goldrush / Pups Save The Paw Patroller
programme.desc: When a grizzled old prospector discovers gold in Adventure Bay, it's a bona fide, dog gone, gold rush! // When Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew try to steal the Paw Patroller, the chase becomes a rescue!

programme.title: E303 - Pups Save The Soccer Game / Pups Save A Lucky Collar
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol are called in to play. // The Paw Patrol must work as a team to overcome some dirty tricks by Mayor Humdinger and pull out a victory!

programme.title: E207 - The Barbapapa Family / The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E204 - Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: E305 - The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Mak
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: E807 - Tool Truck Blaze
programme.desc: When three construction emergencies break out all over town, Blaze must save the day by becoming: Tool Truck Blaze! With a toolbox full of amazing tools, Blaze is ready to hammer, drill and saw through any obstacle in his way! Tool Truck Power!

programme.title: E204 - Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: E225 - The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E6 - End of Summer
programme.desc: Follow vet Tim as he races to save rescued koala Ashley, then meet a flying fox with an extra digit who needs some TLC from vet Martine. Calculate the odds for a run-over kangaroo joey with vet Emily, then celebrate the release of 50 lorikeets.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E6 - End of Summer
programme.desc: Follow vet Tim as he races to save rescued koala Ashley, then meet a flying fox with an extra digit who needs some TLC from vet Martine. Calculate the odds for a run-over kangaroo joey with vet Emily, then celebrate the release of 50 lorikeets.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E3 - A Busy Bay
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Marina Bay, where the Nomads and Townies are squatting while Anna and the Bay Family are away upriver. Soak up the peaceful otter life in this luxurious waterway before the surprise early return of its rightful owners.

programme.title: E4 - Hunkering Down
programme.desc: Winter is coming, and the animals take advantage of autumn’s final bounty before the cold, barren months ahead. Watch some creatures search for respite indoors, while others arrive from far northern climates to settle in the ploughed fields.

programme.title: E5 - Wine’s New Friend
programme.desc: Join two seriously ill orangutans in the medical clinic, where Erik’s head infection is causing concern and fourteen-year-old Mia’s life depends on a blood transfusion. Outside the clinic, the infants find a secret treat hidden inside a rubber tree.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E4 - Hunkering Down
programme.desc: Winter is coming, and the animals take advantage of autumn’s final bounty before the cold, barren months ahead. Watch some creatures search for respite indoors, while others arrive from far northern climates to settle in the ploughed fields.

programme.title: E7 - Maldives - Paradise Shrinking
programme.desc: The Maldives face an uncertain future as rising sea levels threaten to wipe out the tiny island. See how researchers are rebuilding the reef around the island, working to save sea turtles, and uncovering complex behaviours of resident manta rays.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: E6 - Get Your Phil
programme.desc: Padma gets a real rise out of the chefs when she tasks them to make a Quickfire dish without any All-Purpose flour. Instead chefs must work with alternative flours from Blue Corn and Buckwheat to Coconut and Hazelnut.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: E9 - Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: E6 - Get Your Phil
programme.desc: Padma gets a real rise out of the chefs when she tasks them to make a Quickfire dish without any All-Purpose flour. Instead chefs must work with alternative flours from Blue Corn and Buckwheat to Coconut and Hazelnut.

programme.title: E28 - Drive You Crazy
programme.desc: After the Rust Bucket breaks down at a Mobile Home Park, Ben discovers they've stumbled on to the last leg of the Cali 10 Hundred, an epic, off-road auto race.

programme.title: E26 - The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: E2 - Ali Baba And The Forty Thieves
programme.desc: Ali Baba is a young Arabian girl who outsmarts the Great One and his forty thieves.

programme.title: E34 - Zombozo-Land
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen!

programme.title: E33 - The Apprentice Games Part 1
programme.desc: The Apprentice Games have begun and Chowder feels he's not prepared until Mung gives him the ultimate thrice cream.

programme.title: E9 - I Wish I Could Get Back At Emma
programme.desc: A wish seems to ask Ruby and the others to take revenge into their hands. Mina stands her ground and refuses. Will Ruby learn something from this?

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

E498 - Cut Short
programme.desc: After a 14-year-old boy is shot to death outside of a friend's house, detectives wonder if he was caught in the middle of a sinister plot.

programme.title: E1 - Zachary Wester
programme.desc: Zachary Wester, a sheriff's deputy from Jackson County, Florida, stands accused of planting drugs on unsuspecting motorists during routine traffic stops. He's been charged with over 65 counts.

programme.title: E8 - Breaking The Iceman
programme.desc: Agent Dominick Polifrone poses as a mobster to stop the Iceman; Det. Carlos James goes undercover to thwart a plot against a woman's ex.

programme.title: E16 - Murder On Mirror Lake
programme.desc: The husband and father of a murdered family attacks their killer in court; a judge has no patience for a foul-mouthed defendant; a convicted drunk driver begs the judge for mercy; and more.

programme.title: E6 - Alex Woodworth
programme.desc: When a woman reports a brutal assault, investigators discover shifting stories, divided loyalties, and a jealous love triangle with deadly consequences.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: E472
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Okinawa Rendez-vous
programme.desc: Jenny wakes up and decides to leave her lover Sato, a triad boss. She takes Sato's ransom money to Tang, who has a diary with explicit details of Sato's triad activities.

programme.title: The Accidental Spy
programme.desc: Buck trails two suspicious men and jumps into action to foil their plans. Soon after he meets Liu, who convinces Buck that he may be the long-lost son of a rich korean businessman...

programme.title: Shanghai Blues
programme.desc: In 1937, Tung, a young soldier, meet Shu under the Soochow Bridge, Shanghai, where they have been sheltering from the bombing of the city by Japanese planes. In the semi-darkness, though unable to see each other clearly, the young couple experience an immediate attraction towards each other, and plan how to meet again when the war is over...

programme.title: Hero Of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Sammy is a man of honour. He lives by the underworld's code of honour. He helps friends and kills enemies, for instance, Ng Kong who got him 3 years behind bars. Sammy is now a fugitive in Taiwan being protected by Kui, one of the gang leaders. Once Kui injures Peter, his opposition and young Crow takes the rap. Sammy and Crow become friends. Sammy tries to mediate between Kui and Peter but finds out being used by Kui to eliminate Peter. He wants out. But Crow joins Kui's gang after killing Peter. Sammy retires to Crow's home town and falls in love with his sister. Kui begins to turn against Crow. He sends Crow to Hong Kong and orders to kill him. Crow escapes back to Taiwan, only to find his girlfriend has committed suicide after Kui's gang has raped her. At the same moment, Kui's men come for him and kill his sister who comes with Sammy to deliver their wedding news. With Sammy by his side, Crow starts his vendetta...

programme.title: Okinawa Rendez-vous
programme.desc: Jenny wakes up and decides to leave her lover Sato, a triad boss. She takes Sato's ransom money to Tang, who has a diary with explicit details of Sato's triad activities.

programme.title: E11 - A Nap For Mommy
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E11 - A Nap For Mommy

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: E374 - Ancient Brainteaser/Couch Wrestling/Goldrush
programme.desc: The Lemmings take off with the last jar of Yummy chocolate spread. Grizzy catches up with them but they drop the jar and it lands in a nearby sacred temple. Grizzy and the Lemmings must solve riddles along the path to the Yummy.

programme.title: E119 - The Great Foot Heist/Lenny Man
programme.desc: Mo forgot to do his art homework, he takes the first object he can find, and rushes to his school. But his object gets confiscated, and he needs to plan a heist in Brick office.

programme.title: E198 - Blundercup/Small World: Abra-Disaster - Part 1/Small World: Stone Cold Spider - Part
programme.desc: Buttercup is knocked off-kilter by a mysterious force.

programme.title: E9 - The Workaholic Ants/Uncool Coldness/Follow The Balloons!/The Birth Of A Super Hero
programme.desc: Shiro finds out that there are traces of the Bobobobobone in a park in District 9. He heads to the park using his Super Dash and finds an army of ants carrying the Bobobobobone.

programme.title: E103 - My Interview With Superman
programme.desc: Lois wants to interview Superman for The Daily Planet, and Clark must figure out how to help her while protecting his secret identity!

programme.title: E1 - A. Spike Gets Skooled/Cats Ruffled Furniture
programme.desc: Tom gets Spike sent to obedience school, and Jerry is left without a protector. When Spike returns, Tom tries hard to get Spike to revert to his old ways, but Jerry fights back.

programme.title: E1135 - Batman Vs. Teen Titans: Dark Injustice/Wally T/The Teen Titans Go Easter Holiday Clas
programme.desc: The Titans try to out prank each other on April Fools' Day.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: E9 - Country Captain Chicken Stew
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: E48 - Poblano Nachos
programme.desc: Rachael brings a taste of Mexico to Lake George with her twist on chile relleno stuffed poblano peppers. Her version is filled with tortilla chips, cheese, pinto bean dip and more cheese.

programme.title: E18 - Chrissie And Jamie
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: A Kidnapping In Amish Country
programme.desc: When Amish woman Lena realises her daughter has been abducted, she is forced to turn to the only person who can help: her estranged best friend Skye, who has renounced the Amish way of life.

programme.title: E18 - Chrissie And Jamie

programme.title: E46 - Grilled Sea Bass
programme.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sauteed baby bok choy.

programme.title: E61 - Cucina Povera Meatloaf

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Queen Of Crime
programme.desc: Outraged by an extortionate water bill she has no hope of paying, a frustrated housewife becomes a private detective.

programme.title: Rabiye Kurnaz Vs. George W. Bush
programme.desc: A Turkish housewife fights to free her son from unlawful detention in Guantanamo Bay prison.

programme.title: The Day Shall Come
programme.desc: An impoverished preacher who has no idea his sponsor works for the FBI who plan to turn him into a criminal

programme.title: The Day Shall Come
programme.desc: An impoverished preacher who has no idea his sponsor works for the FBI who plan to turn him into a criminal

programme.title: E2 - Peugeot, The 04 Series
programme.desc: In Rabodanges, in the Orne region. Laurent meets Joel Chauvin, a young retiree and avid Peugeot collector. After a focus on the Mazda MX5, Michel heads to Dieppe to pay tribute to Jean Redele, the father of the Alpine brand.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E1 - Rock'n Flight
programme.desc: Al Comet, alias Alain Monod, is a former member of the Young Gods, pioneers of electro industrial music. At 65, he traded his electric guitar for an Indian sitar. And when he is not giving concerts, it is in the air that he practices his other passion, aerial acrobatics.

programme.title: E13 - In Saint-Brieuc, With Maxime Tabart
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E4 - Like A Fish In Water/Identical Cousins
programme.desc: With his large moustache and beanie, you can't fail to recognise Denis Junod. At 70 he continues to lift his fishing nets, every day, near Auvernier. Gaelle is a property broker and photographer, Carlyn an opera singer. Their passion for music and nature has created a timeless bond between them...

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E51 - Aix-Les-Bains (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the region's spa tradition and the Faure Museum.

programme.title: E6 - The Chef Philip Chronopoulos
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: E4 - Like A Fish In Water/Identical Cousins
programme.desc: With his large moustache and beanie, you can't fail to recognise Denis Junod. At 70 he continues to lift his fishing nets, every day, near Auvernier. Gaelle is a property broker and photographer, Carlyn an opera singer. Their passion for music and nature has created a timeless bond between them...

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E51 - Aix-Les-Bains (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the region's spa tradition and the Faure Museum.

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: E1 - Rock'n Flight
programme.desc: Al Comet, alias Alain Monod, is a former member of the Young Gods, pioneers of electro industrial music. At 65, he traded his electric guitar for an Indian sitar. And when he is not giving concerts, it is in the air that he practices his other passion, aerial acrobatics.

programme.title: E13 - In Saint-Brieuc, With Maxime Tabart
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E2 - Peugeot, The 04 Series
programme.desc: In Rabodanges, in the Orne region. Laurent meets Joel Chauvin, a young retiree and avid Peugeot collector. After a focus on the Mazda MX5, Michel heads to Dieppe to pay tribute to Jean Redele, the father of the Alpine brand.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E8 - Parker Comes Calling
programme.desc: Kevin is sent reeling when Parker shows up demanding the money he's owed. Parker discovers he's losing gold from a wash plant on Dominion Creek.

programme.title: E8 - Demolition Derby
programme.desc: A chance encounter in Utah escalates from death threats in a parking lot to a demolition derby on the interstate.

programme.title: E8 - Cornelia Marie Blue

programme.title: E2 - When Parker Met Rick
programme.desc: Rick Ness takes a job working on 16-year-old Parker Schnabel's gold mine. The two miners form a strong bond, bringing in millions in gold.

programme.title: E10 - 爆閃一家人 爆笑過大年
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E34 - 電競男神來相親
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E2 - 郭孟旭與好友走心聊人生
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Deconstructing the Cold War Universe
programme.desc: Director Longman Leung is here to shed light on the mysteries of the “Cold War” series. What actually does the operation codename “Cold War” mean? Longman reveals that not a single shot had been fired in the first script while the foreshadowing in dialogue of 'Cold War' and 'Cold War 2' are going to be revealed in the sequel! Let's find out more behind-the-scenes stories of the “Cold War” series shared by Longman.
